data.body:
## Description
Add artifact review instructions to both SKILL.md files so that generated artifacts are presented for user approval before writing. When artifacts already exist, show a diff rather than full replacement.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md

SAFEGUARD FILES: Both SKILL.md files are protected per CLAUDE.md rule 18.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -3
- [ ] All onboarding tests pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -q 'FAILED: 0'
- [ ] All architect-foundation tests pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -q 'FAILED: 0'
- [ ] SKILL.md files reference artifact review
  Verify: grep -qi 'review.*before.*writ\|approval.*before\|present.*artifact' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
